option.name: originalContent
option.value: FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-alpine WORKDIR /app COPY target/*.jar app.jar EXPOSE 8080 ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: FROM eclipse-temurin:25.0.2_10-jdk WORKDIR /app COPY target/*.jar app.jar EXPOSE 8080 ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "app.jar"]

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
